name: Durango (Upper)

restrictions.text: Fire restrictions may be in place, for up to date info:

thresholds:
ERC > 90%, BI > 90%, Wind Speed > 13
Max Temp > 83, Min Rh < 10, 1000hr Fuels < 11, Max RH < 31
If three or more of the seven thresholds are met, consider it a watchout.
raws:
The Upper Fire Danger Rating Area uses the following Remote Automated Weather Stations (RAWS) which are equally weighted in value, using Fuel Model Z (Slash) incorporating data years 2005-2024 are:  
Salter (055205), Devil Mtn. (055901), Sandoval (055902), Log Chute (055808)
